nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 2am. Cloudy. Low around 47, with temperatures rising to around 55 overnight. South southeast wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 3pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 78, with temperatures falling to around 75 in the afternoon. South southwest wind 15 to 30 mph, with gusts as high as 45 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 4am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a low around 62. Southwest wind 15 to 25 mph, with gusts as high as 40 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
